filler_pool.turn: Read the NDA template DOC-101 and create a new NDA for our partnership with InnoTech Labs

state_item.title: NDA Template - Standard Mutual
state_item.content:
MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Agreement is entered into by and between [PARTY A] and [PARTY B].

Definition of Confidential Information: Any non-public information disclosed by either party including but not limited to business plans, technical data, customer lists, and financial information.

Obligations: Receiving party shall protect confidential information with same degree of care used for its own confidential information.

Term: 3 years from effective date. Survival: 2 years after termination.

Exclusions: Publicly available information, independently developed information, information received from third parties without restriction.

filler_pool.turn: Create NDA document titled 'Mutual NDA - TechCorp and InnoTech Labs', parties: TechCorp Inc. and InnoTech Labs, content: 'Standard mutual non-disclosure agreement with 2-year confidentiality term covering AI model training datasets and proprietary algorithms.'

state_item.title: Consulting Agreement Template
state_item.content:
CONSULTING AGREEMENT

This Agreement is between [COMPANY] and [CONSULTANT].

Scope of Work: [DESCRIPTION OF SERVICES]
Compensation: [RATE/FEE STRUCTURE]
Term: [START DATE] through [END DATE]
IP Assignment: All work product created during engagement is owned by Company.
Confidentiality: Consultant agrees to maintain confidentiality of all Company information.
Independent Contractor: Consultant is an independent contractor, not an employee.

Between [CLIENT] and [DEVELOPER].

Source Code: Delivered upon final payment.
Maintenance: Optional 12-month support agreement available.

state_item.title: Service Level Agreement Template
state_item.content:
SERVICE LEVEL AGREEMENT

Between [PROVIDER] and [CUSTOMER].

Service Description: [DETAILED SERVICE SCOPE]
Uptime Guarantee: 99.9% measured monthly.
Response Times: Critical: 1 hour, High: 4 hours, Medium: 8 hours, Low: 24 hours.
Credits: 5% of monthly fee per 0.1% below SLA target.
Exclusions: Scheduled maintenance, force majeure, customer-caused issues.
Reporting: Monthly SLA performance reports.

filler_pool.turn: Create a data processing addendum titled 'DPA - TechCorp and CloudMetrics Inc' between TechCorp Inc. (controller) and CloudMetrics Inc. (processor). Data categories: user analytics events, anonymized behavioral data, and aggregated usage statistics. Processing purpose: performance monitoring and product analytics only. Security: AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. Sub-processors require prior written approval. Breach notification within 48 hours. Deletion within 30 days of termination.

state_item.title: Data Processing Addendum Template
state_item.content:
DATA PROCESSING ADDENDUM

This DPA supplements the Agreement between [CONTROLLER] and [PROCESSOR].

Data Categories: [TYPES OF PERSONAL DATA]
Processing Purpose: [PERMITTED PURPOSES ONLY]
Security Measures: [TECHNICAL AND ORGANIZATIONAL MEASURES]
Sub-processors: [LIST AND APPROVAL PROCESS]
Data Subject Rights: Processor assists Controller in responding to requests.
Breach Notification: Within 48 hours of discovery.
Deletion: Upon termination, delete or return all personal data within 30 days.
